generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital expanded domestic security powers are for protecting our communities. The current framework is outdated - we need modern tools to stop threats before they strike. Civil liberties concerns are valid, but responsible oversight ensures we maintain that balance. Our allies are strengthening their capabilities - we can't afford to fall behind. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
